reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención lo único que se complica es para calibrar las cubiertas por la manguera pero es solo tomarse unos minutos mas

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, the only tricky part is calibrating the tires through the hose, but it only takes a few extra minutes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQya05fLWNnEAE

reviews.comment:
Los empleados parece que fueran de la Asociación de Trabajadores del Estado (ATE). Le piden permiso a un pie para mover el otro; no pueden hacer dos cosas a la vez como cargar a uno y cobrarle al otro, o se quedan sosteniendo la manguera como si ésta se fuera a escapar....síntesis, son unos flojos, me da bronca tanta flojera. El tiempo es oro, pero los playeros del ACA no lo saben....Y si alguno tuvo otra suerte que me lo comente....yo necesito E-FI-CIEN-CIA y no la encuentro en los playeros del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
The employees seem like they belong to the State Workers' Association (ATE). They ask permission from one foot to move the other; they can't do two things at once, like loading one car and ringing up another, or they just stand there holding the hose as if it's going to slip off... in short, they're lazy, and their laziness makes me angry. Time is money, but the ACA gas station attendants don't seem to know it... And if anyone has had better luck, let me know... I need E-FICIENCY and I can't find it with the ACA gas station attendants.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyNy0zMG1RRRAB
